title: Supply Chain Manager #81370
description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: Manufacturer – Dairy Products
  • Position Title: Supply Chain Manager
  • Working Location: Pioneer
  • Working Hours: 5 days (Mon to Fri: 8:45am – 5.30pm)
  • Salary Package: Basic + AWS + Performance Bonus
  • Duration: Permanent

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead end-to-end export operations, including bookings, vessel schedules, cut-off management, documentation, and customer coordination.
  • Prepare, review, and submit all export and regulatory documents (Japan exports, Halal, SFA approvals/submissions, Health Certificates, COO, customs declarations, invoices, packing lists, and country-specific requirements).
  • Coordinate with QA, Production, Warehouse vendors, Procurement, and Finance to ensure accurate, on-time shipments.
  • Manage customer complaints end-to-end, including investigations, corrective actions, and closure.
  • Control and reduce export costs (demurrage, detention, storage, freight) through disciplined planning and follow-up.
  • Maintain export trackers/dashboards and provide weekly reporting to Management.
  • Review and improve export SOPs, workflows, and documentation accuracy.
  • Oversee import operations and inbound coordination with suppliers and agents (as scope expands).
  • Manage warehousing and logistics vendors, ensuring stock accuracy and strong inventory movement controls.
  • Improve inventory visibility, inter-factory transfers, and alignment with production planning.
  • Drive continuous improvement across export, import, warehousing, and inventory processes.
  • Provide costing analysis and operational recommendations directly to Management.
  • Lead and develop a supply chain team improve role clarity, workloads, accountability, and standard ways of working.
  • Deliver measurable cost savings through process, manpower, and logistics optimisation.
  • Perform other duties as assigned.

APPLY NOW!!!

  • At least 5–7 years in manufacturing/factory operations in a similar environment.
  • Proven experience in food manufacturing, regulatory documentation, and Japan exports is essential.

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

  • Submit your application by clicking the APPLY button;
  • Email your resume to Job@anradus.com.sg. Please indicate #81370 on the email subject.

Anradus Application Policy: We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.
